description: Generic JSON content model normalized from CMS block properties.

fields.name: blockHeading
fields.description: Optional heading shown above the badge. Leave blank to hide.

fields.name: membershipYearLabel
fields.description: Label shown next to the membership year value.

fields.name: issuedLabel
fields.description: Label shown above the issued date.

fields.name: expiresLabel
fields.description: Label shown above the expiry date.

fields.name: accessBadgeCtaLabel
fields.description: Label for the button that routes the user to their full digital badge.

fields.name: activeStatusLabel
fields.description: Label shown in the status pill when the badge is active.

fields.name: expiredStatusLabel
fields.description: Label shown in the status pill when the badge has expired.

fields.name: loadingStateLabel
fields.description: Accessibility label announced while the badge data is loading.

fields.name: errorStateMessage
fields.description: Message shown when the badge cannot be loaded.

fields.name: noBadgeStateMessage
fields.description: Message shown when the user has no digital badge on their account.

fields.name: hideWhenNoBadge
fields.description: If checked, the block is not rendered when the user has no digital badge.
